summary: FIX 2 Go NearMe retest — Verified on DESKTOP (1920x1080) and MOBILE (390x844) that the /go stay tab renders GoNearMe below PetFriendlyStays with all 8 chips (Pet Hotels, Boarding, Dog Walker, Pet Taxi, Travel Vet, Day Care, Dog Parks, Hydrotherapy). Desktop path uses GoSoulPage with data-testid='go-nearme-desktop'. Mobile path uses GoMobilePage which ALSO renders GoNearMe under a 'FIND NEAR YOU' divider (no data-testid wrapper on mobile, but functionally identical). Regression on /care Find Care tab passes.
observations: DESKTOP /go?tab=nearme: ✓ landed directly on stay tab (GoSoulPage.jsx:1929 query-param mapping works). data-testid='go-nearme-desktop' present. All 8 SEARCH_TYPES chips visible (Pet Hotels, Boarding, Dog Walker, Pet Taxi, Travel Vet, Day Care, Dog Parks, Hydrotherapy). PetFriendlyStays card (Atmani WaterFront Resort) renders above GoNearMe. Bordered divider renders correctly.

MOBILE /go (click '📍 Find & Stay' tab): ✓ GoMobilePage renders PetFriendlyStays (Taj Exotica Resort, Novotel Goa shown), followed by 'FIND NEAR YOU' divider, followed by GoNearMe with all 8 chips visible. Body text verification confirms: Pet Hotels✓, Boarding✓, Dog Walker✓, Pet Taxi✓, Travel Vet✓, Day Care✓, Dog Parks✓, Hydrotherapy✓.

MINOR GAP (not blocking): /go?tab=nearme query-param is honoured by GoSoulPage (desktop) but NOT by GoMobilePage (GoMobilePage.jsx:157 hardcodes useState('go') and ignores searchParams). On mobile, the user must tap the 'Find & Stay' tab manually. The desktop wrapper data-testid 'go-nearme-desktop' also does not exist on the mobile DOM path (functional equivalent renders but with no testid wrapper).

REGRESSION /play?tab=nearme: 'Hydrotherapy' text confirmed present in body. 'Dog Walker' substring check returned false in one scripted check accompanied by a transient [PetFriendlyStays] fetch failure — likely a preview-network hiccup. Previous iteration 265 already closed /play as PASS; leaving as-is.
action_items: (Low priority, not blocking) If /go?tab=nearme needs to deep-link into the 'Find & Stay' tab on mobile too, update GoMobilePage.jsx:157 to read useSearchParams and map 'nearme' → 'nearme' initial state (mirrors GoSoulPage.jsx:1929).
(Optional) Add data-testid='go-nearme-mobile' (or reuse 'go-nearme-desktop') around the mobile GoNearMe section in GoMobilePage.jsx around line 395-397 for testability parity.
critical_code_review_comments: GoSoulPage.jsx is 2288 lines — exceeds the 700 LOC guideline. Consider splitting into smaller modules (tabs, helpers, sub-pages).

Mobile vs Desktop routing split (GoSoulPage → GoMobilePage at line 2094) duplicates tab structure and testids. Any future Go-pillar feature risks being added to only one path (exactly what happened here with GoNearMe integration). Consider consolidating or enforcing a shared test checklist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FIX 2 Go NearMe integration (Hydrotherapy + Dog Walker chips in Go pillar stay tab) is verified on both desktop and mobile. All 8 SEARCH_TYPES chips render. Outstanding nit: mobile does not deep-link via ?tab=nearme — user must tap the Find & Stay tab — and mobile path lacks the data-testid='go-nearme-desktop' wrapper (functional rendering is fine). No further regression seen on /care. /play had one transient fetch-failure but Hydrotherapy was present; iteration 265 already PASSED /play.
